india_trends.title: From turbulence to triumph: Why great CEOs define market winners

india_trends.title: Sebi bets on capacity building, tech to strengthen market regulation
india_trends.summary: Market regulator tightens conflict-of-interest norms for top officials, rolls out digital oversight tools and signals a tech-driven, governance-focused regulatory reset.

india_trends.title: Mahindra Finance FY26 PAT jumps 55% YoY to Rs 2,782 crore. Rs 7.5/share dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Mahindra Finance announced a strong financial performance. Profit after tax surged 55 percent year-on-year for the March 2026 quarter. india_trends.title: Axis Bank Q4 Results: PAT falls marginally YoY to Rs 7,071 crore; NII rises 5%
india_trends.summary: Axis Bank Q4 Results: The private lender earned an interest income of Rs 32,724 crore in Q4FY26, which was up by 4.7% over Rs 31,243 crore posted by the company in the corresponding quarter of the previous financial year.

india_trends.title: Mukul Agrawal’s winning bets: 4 stocks turn multibaggers in a year, fresh Q4 picks revealed
india_trends.summary: Investor Mukul Agrawal’s portfolio has delivered strong momentum, with four multibagger stocks in the past year and several double-digit gainers, while also adding five new names in Q4FY26 across sectors including manufacturing, pharma, and digital services.

india_trends.summary: Bitcoin and Ethereum are trading near recent peaks. Bitcoin shows strong monthly performance and increasing dominance. Major altcoins saw mixed movements. india_trends.title: FII exodus deepens in 2026 at Rs 1.75 lakh crore as April outflows swell to Rs 43,967 crore; FOMC next trigger
india_trends.summary: Foreign institutional investors offloaded Indian equities worth Rs 17,140 crore last week, extending April's outflows to Rs 43,967 crore. india_trends.title: Why are copper prices near high and will the momentum continue?
india_trends.summary: Copper prices remain near record levels, supported by AI-driven data centre demand, global electrification, tight mine supply and geopolitical disruptions. india_trends.title: Lodha Developers targets 17% pre-sales growth in FY27 at Rs 24,000 crore
india_trends.summary: Lodha Developers has set a sales booking target of Rs 24,000 crore for the current fiscal, aiming for about 17% growth driven by steady demand in the housing market. india_trends.title: RBI action on Paytm Payments Bank incrementally negative for One 97, says Bernstein; retains ‘Outperform’, sees 30% upside
india_trends.summary: The RBI has cancelled Paytm Payments Bank's license due to regulatory non-compliance, citing detrimental operations and prejudiced management. While Bernstein views this as incrementally negative for parent One 97 Communications, they maintain an 'Outperform' rating, seeing potential for new license

india_trends.title: Paytm says no financial or business impact from PPBL action; services remain fully operational
india_trends.summary: Paytm has said that the Reserve Bank of India’s (RBI) action on Paytm Payments Bank Ltd (PPBL) will have no financial or business impact on the company, stressing that it has no material exposure or operational link with the banking entity.

india_trends.title: Stratosphere and Strategic Investors Acquire 70% Stake in Potion Alpha
ED raids against Raheja Developers
india_trends.summary: The Enforcement Directorate has conducted fresh searches at seven locations in Delhi-NCR. The action is part of a money laundering investigation. It is linked to alleged fraud with home buyers. The probe concerns non-delivery of flats in the Raheja Revanta project.

india_trends.title: Taken-for-granted separation between economics & strategy has collapsed in 21st Century: Pradeep Mehta
india_trends.summary: The lines between economics and strategy have blurred, as highlighted in CUTS International's geoeconomic webinar. Experts discussed how trade policies, power agreements, and chip plants are now geopolitical assets. The series aims to equip developing nations with the tools to navigate this evolving

india_trends.title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 25 April in Delhi, Mumbai, Pune, others
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices remained stable in India's retail market on Saturday, April 25. Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver today in major cities of the country.

india_trends.title: Markets have begun to climb the wall of worry
india_trends.summary: Markets often climb despite worries. In 2020, markets rose before economic recovery. Now, in 2026, markets are recovering amid geopolitical tensions. Investor behavior shows learning from past experiences. Capital is entering markets during fear. While risks remain, markets may have already priced i

india_trends.title: From FAANG to BATMMAAN: the new acronym driving global tech investing, says Niteen Dongare
india_trends.summary: Global investors are shifting focus from FAANG and Magnificent 7 to broader innovation, embracing the BATMMAAN acronym for AI, semiconductors, and digital ecosystems. Niteen Dongare advises staying invested in US markets, emphasizing proven earnings and stable management amidst geopolitical volatili

india_trends.title: Graticule’s Levinson ‘Open’ to Iran Resolution Ahead of Rally
india_trends.summary: Investor Adam Levinson said he remains bullish despite recent market volatility, and is buying the dip ahead of an expected rally on a resolution in the Iran conflict.
